added: Home header now includes an animated clickable version badge that opens the Cooking release-notes view in one tap.
Release badge label now surfaces the latest version automatically using changelog-driven parsing (`Updated version : v...`).
Changelog banner now uses a tighter header-style gradient section for faster scanability on mobile.
improved: Version badge contrast and shimmer animation were refined for clearer visibility in dark mode and compact screens.
Cooking release page spacing was tuned so hero copy and version cards no longer overlap gradient transition areas.
Floating back-to-profile control visual balance and layering were refined for better readability and touch comfort.
removed: Legacy top `Changelog + version pill` header block in Cooking view was removed to simplify the release-reading flow.

added: Attendance Alerts now auto-enroll Web Push after notification permission is granted, so closed-app delivery starts without a second setup flow.
Cooking page now opens from Profile as a dedicated focused release-notes screen.
Version updates are grouped in expandable sections so users can quickly scan what changed.
improved: Session lifecycle checks were tightened to better handle auth drift and reduce unexpected logout loops while moving across pages.
Mobile safe-area spacing and compact layout rhythm were polished for iPhone Safari and narrow Android screens.
Notification/push capability checks now fail more gracefully when service worker or browser push support is limited.
removed: Internal beta/debug profile sections (theme/logo/push controls) were removed from normal user view to keep profile clean.

added: Unread notification badge with lightweight polling to surface pending items without opening notifications first.
Per-user cache hygiene and stale data pruning to prevent old timetable/profile artifacts after account switches.
improved: Batch-aware timetable mapping so schedule cards align better with live day order and actual section context.
Client chunk split strategy for faster repeat loads and lower parsing cost on mid-range mobile devices.
Session touch/refresh behavior to reduce payload rewrites and keep backend load compact during active use.
removed: Excess duplicate local payload writes from hot paths were reduced to keep storage and network churn lower.

added: Safer PWA install prompts and service worker refresh flow for more predictable app upgrades.
Brand-aligned app shell styling with stronger visual hierarchy on compact portrait viewports.
improved: Mobile-first layout density so key actions remain visible with fewer scroll hops on small displays.
Install banner overlap handling to avoid collisions with sticky navigation and bottom safe-area controls.
removed: Legacy visual spacing inconsistencies between profile/action rows were cleaned up for tighter UI rhythm.
